mapper.select:
SELECT sigungu, COUNT(CASE WHEN termGubun = '신규' THEN 1 END) AS newContractCnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN termGubun = '갱신' THEN 1 END) AS renewContractCnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN rightRequ = '사용' THEN 1 END) AS usedRightCnt, ROUND((CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN rightRequ = '사용' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN termGubun = '갱신' THEN 1 END), 0)) * 100, 2) AS usePercent FROM KR_REAL_RENT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND sido = #{sido}
AND ContYear BETWEEN CONCAT(#{year}, '01') AND CONCAT(#{year}, '12')
GROUP BY sigungu ORDER BY sigungu ASC
